title: Why AI Models Pause to Think: Test Time Compute Explained
summary: Test time compute is a technique where AI models allocate computational resources during inference to deliberate and reason through problems, often displayed as visible pauses. The video explains how chain of thought and reasoning models leverage this approach to boost accuracy on harder problems.
